---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that harness doesn't currently let you
     do well? Concrete examples beat abstract requests. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What change would unblock you? CLI flag, new playbook, adapter
     hook, template option — be specific. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workarounds did you try? What other approaches did you weigh? -->

## Scope

<!-- Is this a small surgical change or a larger initiative? Are you
     volunteering to implement it? -->
